description_long: This modern house is situated on a rectangular lot surrounded by a low fence and features a flat roof with clean, geometric lines. The front facade is dominated by a large, dark gray rectangular volume with minimalistic windows and a covered carport area. The property includes a driveway with two parked cars, a small front garden, and a covered patio area adjacent to the house. The backyard is spacious, featuring a swimming pool with organic curves, a circular hot tub, and a landscaped garden with several mature trees and shrubs. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with large panes providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, open outdoor spaces, and a blend of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a dark gray facade, large windows, a carport, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, carport, driveway, and front garden with a low fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the carport, driveway, and the full length of the house, as well as the pool and backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the backyard, swimming pool, hot tub, and mature trees, with the house's large windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the pool, hot tub, and side garden, with the flat roof and minimalistic window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, simple door, and adjacent carport; no decorative columns or steps.
